word: G4829 - συμμερίζομαι - symmerízomai - soom-mer-id'-zom-ahee - Be partaker with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be partaker with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to divide at the same time, divide together; to assign a portion
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice from G4862 and G3307; to share jointly, that is, participate in: - be partaker with.
